ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
Language: javascript
The all-in-one Desktop & Docker AI application with built-in RAG, AI agents, No-code agent builder, MCP compatibility, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: badlogic/pi-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/badlogic/pi-skills
Language: javascript
Skills for pi coding agent (compatible with Claude Code and Codex CLI)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: carbon-design-system/carbon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/carbon-design-system/carbon
Language: javascript
A design system built by IBM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gsd-build/get-shit-done
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done
Language: javascript
A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code and OpenCode.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: journey-ad/gemini-watermark-remover
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/journey-ad/gemini-watermark-remover
Language: javascript
A high-performance, 100% client-side tool for removing Gemini AI watermarks. Built with pure JavaScript, it leverages a mathematically precise Reverse Alpha Blending algorithm rather than unpredictable AI inpainting. / 基于 Javascript 的纯浏览器端 Gemini AI 图像无损去水印工具，使用数学精确的反向 Alpha 混合算法

ns0:entry.ns0:title: liyupi/ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liyupi/ai-guide
Language: javascript
程序员鱼皮的 AI 资源大全 + Vibe Coding 零基础教程，分享大模型选择指南（DeepSeek / GPT / Gemini / Claude）、最新 AI 资讯、Prompt 提示词大全、AI 知识百科（RAG / MCP / A2A）、AI 编程教程、AI 工具用法（Cursor / Claude Code / OpenClaw / TRAE / Lovable / Agent Skills）、AI 开发框架教程（Spring AI / LangChain）、AI 产品变现指南，帮你快速掌握 AI 技术，走在时代前沿。本项目为开源文档版本，已升级为鱼皮 AI 导航网站

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maboloshi/github-chinese
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maboloshi/github-chinese
Language: javascript
GitHub 汉化插件，GitHub 中文化界面。 (GitHub Translation To Chinese)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
Language: javascript
Community curated list of templates for the nuclei engine to find security vulnerabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siteboon/claudecodeui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siteboon/claudecodeui
Language: javascript
Use Claude Code, Cursor CLI or Codex on mobile and web with CloudCLI (aka Claude Code UI). CloudCLI is a free open source webui/GUI that helps you manage your Claude Code session and projects remotely

ns0:entry.ns0:title: webpack/webpack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/webpack/webpack
Language: javascript
A bundler for javascript and friends. Packs many modules into a few bundled assets. Code Splitting allows for loading parts of the application on demand. Through "loaders", modules can be CommonJs, AMD, ES6 modules, CSS, Images, JSON, Coffeescript, LESS, ... and your custom stuff.
